title.en: The end for Nagelsmann? Germany suffer their 'next football nightmare'
title.zh-CN: 纳格尔斯曼的终结？德国遭遇“下一场足球噩梦”

summary.en: Germany make a shock last-32 exit against Paraguay, losing a World Cup penalty shootout for the first time to pile pressure on boss Julian Nagelsmann.
summary.zh-CN: 德国队在最后32场对阵巴拉圭队的比赛中表现出色，首次输掉了世界杯点球大战，给老板朱利安·纳格尔斯曼（ Julian Nagelsmann ）施加了压力。

title.en: Inside Paraguay's tears of joy over their seismic World Cup shock
title.zh-CN: 巴拉圭地震世界杯震惊的喜悦之泪

summary.en: How Paraguay marked one of the biggest wins in their footballing history with euphoric celebrations.
summary.zh-CN: 巴拉圭如何通过兴奋的庆祝活动来庆祝其足球历史上最大的胜利之一。

title.en: Germany beaten on penalties as Paraguay reach last 16
title.zh-CN: 随着巴拉圭队进入16强，德国队在点球大战中被击败

summary.en: Four-time winners Germany are knocked out of the 2026 World Cup, losing to Paraguay 4-3 on penalties, following a 1-1 draw after extra time.
summary.zh-CN: 四次获胜的德国队在2026年世界杯上被淘汰出局，在加时赛后以1-1平局输给巴拉圭队，罚球4-3。

title.en: 'A joke' - how a 'terrible' VAR disallowed goal cost Germany
title.zh-CN: “一个笑话” -一个“可怕的” VAR不允许的目标如何使德国付出代价

summary.en: Alan Shearer, Jurgen Klopp, Pat Nevin and Darren Cann feel Germany were hard done by as a VAR call rules out a potential winning goal before they lose on penalties to Paraguay.
summary.zh-CN: Alan Shearer、Jurgen Klopp、Pat Nevin和Darren Cann认为德国队做得很艰难，因为VAR通话在他们输给巴拉圭队之前排除了一个潜在的胜利目标。

title.en: 'Germany play one way - and it doesn't work anymore'
title.zh-CN: “德国以一种方式发挥作用-它不再起作用了”

summary.en: The team in the studio talk about what went wrong for Germany as they go out of the World Cup to Paraguay
summary.zh-CN: 工作室的团队谈论德国队在世界杯结束后前往巴拉圭时出了什么问题

title.en: Canale scores winning penalty after Tah blazes over as Germany knocked out
title.zh-CN: Canale在德国淘汰赛中Tah失利后得分

summary.en: Four-time winners Germany are knocked out of the 2026 World Cup on penalties as Jonathan Tah blazes over in sudden death before Jose Canale scores the winning penalty.
summary.zh-CN: 四次获胜的德国队在2026年世界杯上被罚下场，因为乔纳森·塔（ Jonathan Tah ）在何塞·卡纳莱（ Jose Canale ）得分之前突然死亡。

title.en: Relive thrilling penalty shootout between Germany and Paraguay
title.zh-CN: 重温德国和巴拉圭之间激动人心的点球大战

summary.en: Watch every penalty from Germany's last 32 match against Paraguay in the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 观看德国在2026年世界杯对阵巴拉圭的最后32场比赛中的每一次点球。

title.en: Morocco beat Netherlands on penalties to set up Canada clash LIVE!
title.zh-CN: 摩洛哥在点球大战中击败荷兰，现场设置加拿大冲突！

title.zh-CN: 荷兰对摩洛哥： 2026年世界杯最后32场比赛进行点球大战–现场直播

title.en: 45 minutes from Brazil 'humiliation' - but 'Crafty Carlo' does it again
title.zh-CN: 距离巴西“羞辱” 45分钟路程，但“狡猾的卡洛”又来了

summary.en: Half-time in Houston and Brazil's players trudged off facing another early World Cup exit. But we should have known better than to doubt Carlo Ancelotti.
summary.zh-CN: 在休斯顿上半场，巴西的球员们又一次面对世界杯的早期退出。但我们应该知道不要怀疑卡洛·安切洛蒂。

title.en: How Tuchel is still searching for solutions out wide - Shearer
title.zh-CN: Tuchel如何仍在广泛寻找解决方案- Shearer

summary.en: Former England captain Alan Shearer explains why there are lots of reasons to be positive about the Three Lions at this World Cup, but having a settled side is not one of them.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰队队长艾伦·希勒（ Alan Shearer ）解释了为什么在这届世界杯上有很多理由对三狮队持积极态度，但拥有稳定的一面并不是其中之一。

title.en: Move over Messi and Ronaldo - the new generation shining at World Cup
title.zh-CN: 超越梅西和罗纳尔多--在世界杯上闪耀的新一代

summary.en: BBC Sport looks at five young players who are making a big impression on the same World Cup stage as veterans Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo.
summary.zh-CN: BBC Sport观察了五名年轻球员，他们与老将莱昂内尔·梅西和克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多在同一个世界杯舞台上留下了深刻的印象。

title.en: 'You are Canadian heroes' - the forgotten hosts making World Cup history
title.zh-CN: “你们是加拿大的英雄” --被遗忘的东道主创造了世界杯的历史

summary.en: Canada are making history at this World Cup with a run that is likely to change the face of football in the country forever.
summary.zh-CN: 加拿大正在本届世界杯上创造历史，这场比赛可能会永远改变该国足球的面貌。

title.en: Clarke says standing down 'easy' decision after World Cup exit
title.zh-CN: 克拉克说，在世界杯退出后放弃“轻松”的决定

summary.en: Steve Clarke says it was an easy decision to step down as Scotland head coach because he always planned to depart if they did not reach the knockout stage.
summary.zh-CN: 史蒂夫·克拉克（ Steve Clarke ）表示，辞去苏格兰主教练一职很容易，因为如果他们没有达到淘汰赛阶段，他总是计划离开。

summary.en: Kai Havertz equalises for Germany against Paraquay in their last-32 tie.
